---
title: "SQRT_LINK"
generated: true
description: "The square-root link :math:`g( mu) =  sqrt{ mu}`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:SQRT_LINK -->
```python
SQRT_LINK = Link(name='sqrt', link=(lambda mu: jnp.sqrt(jnp.clip(mu, 0.0, None))), linkinv=(lambda eta: eta * eta), mu_eta=(lambda eta: 2.0 * eta))
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:SQRT_LINK -->
The square-root link $g(\mu) = \sqrt{\mu}$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
